name: enhancement-hooks-plan
question: What enhancements will the domain need?
decision: Extend chatDomain: models: ChatSession.featureSession (view to resolve linked FeatureSession); collections: ChatSessionCollection.findByFeatureSession(featureSessionId); rootStore: createFeatureChat(featureSessionId, name) action.
rationale: Minimal enhancements to existing chatDomain. No new domain needed. CollectionPersistable auto-composed. Changes contained to packages/state-api/src/chat/domain.ts.
